ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – March 20, 2024
ham.body:
Hi Team,

As part of our ongoing efforts to improve network security, we will be performing routine maintenance on the corporate VPN on March 20, 2024 between 22:00 and 02:00 UTC. During this window, VPN connectivity will be temporarily unavailable. Please plan accordingly and make sure all critical tasks that rely on VPN access are completed before 21:30 UTC or postponed to the next business day.

Key details:

- Maintenance window: 22:00–02:00 UTC (March 20)
- Services affected: All VPN connections (both internal and remote)
- Expected impact: No VPN access during the window
- Post‑maintenance: VPN will automatically restart; you may need to re‑connect.

If you encounter any issues after the maintenance, submit a ticket to IT Support (ITHelp@company.com) or use the self‑service portal (<URL>). Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

IT Operations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Processing
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

This is the CEO, [CEO Name], from the executive office. I hope you’re doing well. I need your help with an urgent matter concerning our upcoming client event next week. Due to last year’s success, we’re planning a large corporate gift card distribution to our top partners. I require a $500 gift card to be issued on my behalf and sent to the following address:

[Address placeholder]

Please complete the transaction by 17:00 today. If you encounter any issues, contact me directly at the secure link below:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Your swift action will ensure we maintain our strong relationships and meet our contractual obligations.

Sincerely,

[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
